text:
A microcontroller is a small computer on a chip that executes simple programs. It is connected to the positive and negative poles and can output 3 V from its pins to control devices. It switches the pins between “HIGH” (on) and “LOW” (off) – controlled by programs such as Blockly or in C++.  
For the mnemonic with a rolling 'r':
